settings.text: Absolutely love my new divan bed. The quality is outstanding and delivery was so smooth — two men carried it right to my room.
settings.author: Sarah M.

settings.text: The ottoman bed is stunning. Loads of storage and the fabric feels incredibly premium. Would 100% recommend Klawford.
settings.author: James T.

settings.text: Best sleep I've had in years since getting the Klawford mattress. The pocket springs are genuinely next level.
settings.author: Emma R.

settings.text: Fast delivery, great communication, and the bed looks even better in person. Exactly what a bedroom upgrade should feel like.
settings.author: David K.

settings.text: Used the EXTRA30 code on my order — saved a fortune. The upholstered headboard is gorgeous and the whole process was effortless.
settings.author: Lisa P.

settings.title: Happiness Guaranteed or Money Back
settings.description: We're so committed to your satisfaction that after 6 months, if you're not happy simply return it or swap for a new one — no questions asked.

settings.title: Sustainably Sourced & Handmade in the UK
settings.description: Every Klawford bed is handcrafted in Britain using sustainably sourced materials, built to last a lifetime.

settings.title: Fully Customisable to Your Needs
settings.description: Choose your colour, size, storage type, headboard and base type to build the perfect bed for your bedroom.

settings.title: Zero Partner Disturbance
settings.description: The responsive design absorbs motion so you and your partner can enjoy a calm, completely undisturbed night's sleep.

settings.heading: Loved in Homes Just Like Yours

settings.title: Select Your Bed
settings.description: Browse our full range and choose your colour, size, storage and headboard options to create your dream bedroom.

settings.title: Easy, Secure Payment
settings.description: Pay securely online with Klarna, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay and more. 0% interest options available at checkout.

settings.title: 2-Man White Glove Delivery
settings.description: Our 2-man team delivers your bed directly to your room and assembles everything, leaving you to enjoy it straight away.

settings.title: Premium Pocket Spring
settings.description: Individually wrapped springs provide targeted support across every pressure point for a pain-free, restorative sleep.

settings.title: Promotes Good Posture
settings.description: Engineered to support every part of your spine equally, keeping your body perfectly aligned throughout the night.

settings.title: Hypoallergenic Materials
settings.description: Made with hypoallergenic materials so everyone — even allergy sufferers — can enjoy a deep, undisturbed sleep.

settings.title: Zero Motion Transfer
settings.description: Responsive springs absorb movement so you never feel your partner tossing and turning during the night.

settings.question: Do your products conform to UK fire safety regulations?
settings.answer: Yes, all Klawford products are fully compliant with UK fire safety regulations including BS 7177 for mattresses and related furniture. Our factory holds all required certifications.

settings.question: How long does delivery take once I've placed my order?
settings.answer: Standard delivery is 7–14 working days. Express delivery options are available at checkout. You will receive full tracking information once your order has been dispatched.

settings.question: Can I choose my delivery date and time?
settings.answer: Yes — once your order is ready to dispatch, our delivery partner will contact you directly to arrange a convenient date and time window that suits you.

settings.question: Can I track my order on my phone?
settings.answer: Absolutely. You'll receive an email with a real-time tracking link once your order is dispatched. You can also log into your account at any time to view your order status.

settings.question: What is the 60-night risk-free trial?
settings.answer: We're so confident in our products that we offer a 60-night risk-free trial. If you're not completely satisfied within the first 60 nights, contact us for a full refund or free replacement — no questions asked.

settings.question: What does the 5-year warranty cover?
settings.answer: Our 5-year warranty covers all manufacturing defects, structural issues and material faults. Simply contact our customer service team with your order number and we will handle your claim promptly.

settings.question: Can I pay monthly using finance?
settings.answer: Yes! We offer 0% interest financing through Klarna and other providers at checkout. Split your purchase into manageable monthly instalments with no hidden fees or charges.
